    The 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics

    San Diego, California, United States
    July 2–7, 2026

    Photo by Frank Mckenna

    Important: ACL Statement on Desk Rejecting Papers with Hallucinated References

    Welcome!

    The 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026) will take place in San Diego, California, from July 2 - 7, 2026.

    News

    May 8, 2026 Call for shared interest/affinity group events is out.
    May 2, 2026 The list of ACL tutorials is out.
    April 21, 2026 Registration is now open.
    April 20, 2026 Call for virtual subsidies is out.
    April 16, 2026 Call for D&I subsidies is out.
    April 13, 2026 Registration page is available.
    April 11, 2026 Call for volunteers is out.
    April 9, 2026 The list of ACL workshops is out.
    January 12, 2026 System Demonstration call for papers is out.
    December 28, 2025 Student Research Workshop call for papers is out.
    December 22, 2025 Industry track call for papers is out.
    October 8, 2025 Call for papers is out.
    May 23, 2025 The official ACL 2026 website is launched.

    Important Dates

    Submission deadline (all papers are submitted to ARR) January 5, 2026
    ARR reviews & meta-reviews available to authors of January cycle March 10, 2026
    Commitment deadline for ACL 2026 March 14, 2026
    Notification of acceptance April 4, 2026
    Withdrawal deadline April 19, 2026
    Camera-ready deadline April 19, 2026
    Overall Conference July 2 - 7, 2026
    Tutorials July 2, 2026
    Workshops July 3 - 4, 2026
    Welcome Reception July 4, 2026
    Main Conference July 5 - 7, 2026


    All deadlines are 11.59 pm UTC -12h (anywhere on earth).

    FAQ

    Coming soon!
